stations.name: Park Road railway station
stations.walk_minutes_note: Walkable for parts of Woolloongabba. Cross River Rail will add additional inner-city connections.

buses.note: Major South-East Busway interchange at Buranda. Bus routes serve via Stanley Street, Logan Road, and Vulture Street.

driving.motorway_access: M3 corridor, Story Bridge, and Captain Cook Bridge.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 4 to 7 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Goodwill Bridge to South Bank and CBD

secondary_state.name: Brisbane State High catchment may apply for parts

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: The Woolloongabba antique precinct on Logan Road and the surrounding cafe and bar scene anchor daily life. The Gabba stadium sits within the suburb. South Bank cultural precinct is a short walk.

pockets.name: Stanley Street precinct
pockets.character: Mixed-use redevelopment area with apartment market.

pockets.name: Antique precinct / Logan Road
pockets.character: Heritage retail strip and surrounding character home stock.

pockets.name: Gabba precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to the stadium and the Cross River Rail corridor.

buyer_profile.note: Parts of Woolloongabba may fall within the Brisbane State High catchment.
Strong rental demand from professionals and the Cross River Rail upside.
